title: Iron AI
description: A customizable AI chat assistant for Minecraft that can learn words, respond to messages, and be taught new responses with simple commands like /ironai teach
body:
Iron AI – A Smart, Customizable Chat Mod for Minecraft
Iron AI is a lightweight Minecraft mod that brings intelligent conversation to your world. Designed to feel like a personal assistant, Iron AI responds to chat messages, learns new words, forgets them on command, and can be tailored to suit your world’s personality.

💬 Features
Smart Chat Responses: Iron AI detects certain words in chat and responds with personality-rich messages.

Custom Learning System: Teach Iron AI new words and responses in-game using simple commands like /ironai teach.

Forget System: Make Iron AI forget specific words using /ironai forget [word].

Built-in Help: Use /ironai help to view all available commands and functionality.

Persistent Memory: Iron AI saves what it learns in a file so its memory remains even after restarting your game.

Multiple Response Support: You can teach multiple responses for a single keyword — Iron AI picks one randomly!

🎯 Why Use Iron AI?
Iron AI adds character and interaction to your Minecraft world or server. Whether you're roleplaying, running a community server, or just want a smarter in-game experience, Iron AI offers a lightweight, fun, and customizable way to enrich gameplay.
